description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-toast` (T2-07) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-toast/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, variant (success/warning/error/info) typed, duration typed, position typed (top/bottom + left/center/right)
2. Accessibility — `role="alert"` or `role="status"` (appropriate per variant), aria-live region, auto-dismiss respects `prefers-reduced-motion`, close button accessible label, screen reader announces toast content, axe-core pass
3. Tests — all variants, auto-dismiss timing, manual dismiss, stacking behavior, pause-on-hover, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — all variants, positioning, stacking demo
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens, slide/fade animation, CSS parts (toast, icon, message, close-btn)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — JS behaviors for programmatic toast triggering

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-toast/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-toast — T2-07 antagonistic quality review
